monitoring.title: Real-Time Monitoring
monitoring.desc: Track 10,000+ competitor prices across any website. Updates every 30 seconds.

aiAgent.desc: Autonomous AI that analyzes market data and recommends optimal pricing for maximum profit.

simulator.title: Scenario Simulator
simulator.desc: Test what-if scenarios before making changes. See projected revenue, margin, and volume.

repricing.title: Auto-Repricing
repricing.desc: One-click approve or fully autonomous. AI changes prices via Stripe, Shopify, or WooCommerce.

safety.title: Safety Rails
safety.desc: Set minimum margins, price floors, and change limits. AI always respects your rules.

multichannel.title: Multi-Channel
multichannel.desc: Works with any platform: Shopify, WooCommerce, Stripe, SaaS, custom APIs.
